Welcome to OGPlus
Meet OGTrack
Your team's bug tracking headquarters.
Raise bugs, fix faster, ship confidently.
🐛
Track Every Bug
From discovery to fix — every bug has a story.
📋
Raise Bugs
Testers log detailed bug reports with steps, severity and screenshots
🔧
Fix & Track
Developers get assigned bugs and mark them fixed with a summary
✅
Verify & Close
Testers retest and either close or reopen bugs
📊
Full History
Every action logged with timestamps for complete audit trail
⚡
Real-time Everywhere
The whole team stays in sync — instantly.
🔔
Instant Alerts
Get notified the moment a bug is assigned, fixed or reopened
💬
Team Chat
Message your team directly or create group chats
📥
Excel Import
Bulk import bugs straight from your spreadsheet
🌙
Dark Mode
Easy on the eyes — switch themes anytime
🚀
You're all set!
Your account is ready.
Let's start tracking bugs and shipping faster.
